batch_summary.note: S-004: transport offloading cluster Oct 2025 (ROW-14511/14516/14631). ARC-RF03-001 Signal 4.

messages.text: However I'm not committing to picking up at 8:30 at this time. I may be watching some kids tonight and I don't know what time I'd have them until. So if she doesn't [come] you might need to be flexible with my pick up time or need to bring her home
Which I never said no to. It's just that you might need to be flexible with my pick up time or need to bring her home which isn't outrageous given that your last few...
If I am to pick her up tomorrow I won't have availability until 9:30 don't would be better for you to bring her home.

primary_flags.classification: RF-03 primary Sev-1 — Three transport offloading instances in same batch window. ROW-14511/14516: Melissa makes her pickup conditional on personal plans (watching other children), expects Eli to bring Olivia home instead. ROW-14631: pre-empts pickup entirely — states she won't be available until 9:30, so 'better for you to bring her home.' Per ADD-004: recurring pattern of shifting SPP-required transport to Eli. ARC-RF03-001 Signal 4.
primary_flags.addendum_applied: ADD-004 (transport offloading — unilateral shifting of court-required transport obligations).

arc_updates.event: No new signals in B-029. WATCHING state holds.
